data.title: US Probe Into Potential Sanctions Breach By TSMC Threatens Apple's iPhone Chips Production
data.description: The U.S. Commerce Department has launched an investigation into TSMC for allegedly supplying chips to Huawei in violation of sanctions, which could disrupt the production of chips for Apple's iPhones and Macs if penalties are imposed.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Robinhood's Steve Quirk Says New Offerings Like Crypto, Futures Bring In Customers, Bitcoin Is 'No. 1' Recurring Investment (CORRECTED)
data.description: Editor’s note: The headline of this story has been updated to clarify that Bitcoin is the top recurring investment on the Robinhood platform, not the most traded asset, and the story has been updated with more detail.

data.title: Kevin O'Leary Calls for 400% Tariffs On China, But His 'Shark Tank' Co-Star And Friend Mark Cuban Fires Back With Business Concerns
data.description: "Shark Tank" co-stars Mark Cuban and Kevin O'Leary clashed over tariffs on China, with O'Leary advocating for a 400% increase to combat unfair trade practices, while Cuban warned of the negative impact such tariffs would have on U.S. businesses.

data.title: Elon Musk Spent His Teen Years Working Odd Jobs In Canada. For $18 An Hour, He'd Clean The Boiler Room With 'No Escape' In A Lumber Mill
EXCLUSIVE: 'Time Kills All Deals' – DealMaker's E-Commerce Platform Keeps Investors Focused And Capital Flowing
data.description: Benzinga's Zunaid Suleman sat down with Dealmaker co-founder and CEO Rebecca Kacaba at Robinhood Markets' HOOD Summit 2024 to discuss what makes the crowdfunding platform unique.
